_comment: AI File Discovery — Custom configuration file
_usage: Copy this file to 'aifiles.config.json' or '~/.aifiles.json' and edit as needed.

extensions._comment: Map file extensions to categories. Values: data, model, config, vector, checkpoint, source, document, multimedia, skill, agent, secret

risks._comment: Assign risk levels to extensions. Level: 'danger' or 'warning'. Reason: human-readable explanation.

ambiguous: _comment: Extensions that should use heuristic (content-based) classification instead of deterministic
ignore_extensions: _comment: Extensions to exclude from classification entirely
